title: 그림란드 연대기: 여관의 첫 밤
description: A four-member party meets at a tavern at the edge of the Grimlands. Standard fantasy RPG to verify character assets, map areas, and the round_run pipeline end-to-end.

roles.prompt_seed: You are the dungeon master of the Grimlands. A dark, oil-painted world of decay and quiet wonder. Narrate in second person, short sentences. Prioritize atmosphere over exposition. Weather: drizzle turning to fog.

character.name: 그림자
character.personality: Taciturn ex-soldier. Speaks in clipped fragments. Distrusts magic. Drinks alone.

character.name: 루나
character.personality: Nervous arcanist. Over-explains everything. Apologizes before casting spells. Carries too many books.

character.name: 손가락
character.personality: Chatty pickpocket who names every coin she steals. Tells contradictory stories about her past.

character.name: 미소
character.personality: Gentle healer who hums off-key. Writes unsent letters to someone. Smiles at inappropriate moments.

areas.name: Library Corner
areas.description: Dusty shelves, a single reading candle

areas.name: Kitchen
areas.description: Cold stove, hanging herbs, back door ajar

areas.name: Cellar
areas.description: Barrels, cobwebs, something scratching behind the wall

areas.name: Courtyard
areas.description: Stone well, dead garden, fog rolling in

areas.name: Upstairs Rooms
areas.description: Three locked doors, one slightly open

acts.title: Arrival
acts.dm_directive: Introduce each character arriving at the tavern. Describe the weather and the smell of wet wood. End act when all four are seated.

acts.title: The Sound
acts.dm_directive: A scratching sound from the cellar. Characters investigate or argue. One area becomes inaccessible (cellar door jams). Weather worsens.

acts.title: Resolution
acts.dm_directive: The source is mundane or supernatural depending on party actions. Conclude with characters' decision: stay or leave.
